title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Bombay

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Bombay
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
